_comment: EXAMPLE config for a different affiliate network. Copy this file, rename it (e.g. shareasale_toys.json), change the left-hand column names to match that network's CSV headers, and adjust patterns/toggles. The right-hand values should stay the same — they are the field names the WordPress importer expects.

seo.opening_template: Meet the {title} — a collector-grade model with real attention to detail.
seo.closing_template: The {title} is ready to join your display shelf.
